channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overcrowded Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously, 12th June
item.description:
Reported overcrowded Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large branch fallen onto pavement, 12th June
item.description:
A large branch has fallen onto the pavement and needs to be removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hyde Vale, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicles outside of 144 Riverdale causing obstruction, 12th June
item.description:
These vehicles have been parking in their front drive for months now, but now there is also a vehicle parked right in front of their vehicle so there is no space for a wheelchair user to get through, forcing wheelchair users into the road. Please can someone do something about unsuitable double parking.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on small wall, 12th June
item.description:
On the North East corner of Old Street roundabout there is a lot of graffiti on the small wall and large fly posters in the East corner. This area comes under Hackney. Can you please clean this up. Thanks in advance.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer left outside of 158 Riverdale road, 12th June
item.description:
Fridge freezer has been left outside on the pavement of house number 158 Riverdale road. Blocking pavement and blocking access to wheelchair users, forcing them into the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Playground repairs, 12th June
item.description:
Should this be open? Fences all down. Kids all over the equipment. Only saw then pouring the cement in for the zip a couple days ago.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rangefield Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mirror and melamine wood, 12th June
item.description:
Mirror and melamine wood fly tipped outside the front of my flat. Been there for 3 days and still there

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Terrace, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge left outside 118 Riverdale road, 12th June
item.description:
Fridge is blocking pavement and access to pavement for wheelchair users, forcing the wheelchair users into the road. Is there any way where the council can spread word to the surrounding communities not to dump their unwanted furniture on the pavement please? I'm sorry to moan, but I am getting very tired of reporting matter after matter on this road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unauthorised Person Cutting Public Hedges/ vegetation, 12th June
item.description:
Last week I was returning home (on Ravensbourne Avenue) I saw a man in a high visibilty vest cutting the privet etc. hedging by the public footpath opposite Shortlands Golf Club. I work with trees and plants, and I recognised that he was not an official contractor (working for Idverde) etc. I approached him and asked why he was cutting the hedges. He said it was private for the garden of property 79. I said I was aware this was not true, as it was substantially further up the road than the fence for this property. He then said he was doing the public a favour and that the resident of 79 had asked him to do it. I asked him to stop as I am a member of the local public and do not agree this should be done without permission, particularly as it affects wildlife.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on corner of peak hill, 12th June
item.description:
Some fly tipping near to entrance of kirkdale green from peak hill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peak Hill Avenue, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previously reported flytip only partially cleared, 12th June
item.description:
Concrete blocks left behind

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawke Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned furniture and rubbish, 12th June
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Location Of Food Waste Bin, 12th June
item.description:
A black communal food waste bin has been placed on the path outside the entrance of 10 to 17 and 18 to 25 Matlock Court. It blocks the path, smells awful (the smell so bad and strong you can be smell it in the communal hallways of the blocks), has flys buzzing all around it (which are coming into the communal hallways of the blocks,) and is leaking some sort of liquid onto the path. Please can this communal Food Waste bin be moved to a more suitable place , where it's not blocking the path, affecting the communal hallways of the buildings or the residents of the buildings. My suggestion would be on the paving in front of what (I think) was a laundry room, where the Food Waste bin for flats 1 to 9 has been placed. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped divan, 12th June
item.description:
Base of a bed has been dumped on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Congreve Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Cleaning poorly done by the New street Cleaner, 12th June
item.description:
Chapel House Street e14 The Cleaner works on Wednesdays and Fridays This Wednesday the street Cleaning was done very poorly Friday he didn’t even bother turning up to clean the street This is appalling Service the whole street needs cleaning properly we need a new street cleaner wha can use a brush and a brain It’s a busy street we have two takeaways which keeps the street full of empty cartons specially at Nite Please Tower Hamlets clean the streets properly

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti., 12th June
item.description:
Graffiti on the underside of stairs in 53-68 Penrose House.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carter Place, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress and furniture, 12th June
item.description:
Someone has dumped a double mattress and an item of furniture along Finland St. Please could it be removed as soon as possible. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finland Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spray painted parking sign, 12th June
item.description:
Please remove spray paint from parking signage outside No.33 Sutherland Square SE17

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34B, Sutherland Square, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sand and small rocks dumped on pavement by drain, 12th June
item.description:
Some building material, a mixture of sand and small rocks has again been dumped around the tree on the pavement outside 21. I have scooped it away from the tree and into the gutter but have not pushed it down the drain because that might cause problems.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 76, 12th June
item.description:
Multiple potholes along the bus lane section, width approx 1 metre, of the road causing continuous uneven surface over a 5 metre of so section of the road. The locations are where it looks like small sections of the road have had underground works and not been repaired properly.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shoot-Up Hill, London
Report on FixMyStreet
